name: Devereux Molina
role: Civilian boat operator, Industrial Canal corridor
publicFace: A broad-shouldered man in his thirties with a flat-bottomed aluminum skiff and three days of no sleep; he has made this run four times since August 30 and he knows the water
privateGoal: Offload the medical crate and get back to the staging area for another supply run before dark — there are two more camps he has not reached today
fear: That the bridge camp will refuse the crate on some logistical calculation and he will have to take it somewhere else, costing another hour in the heat
knowledge: The crate contains saline solution, electrolyte packets, and a sealed package of pediatric antibiotics — he read the manifest at the staging area
He picked up a partial radio transmission from the Algiers attic station that suggests the mirror array signal has been degraded; he is not sure the bridge camp knows this
The water on the Flood Street blocks has dropped four inches since this morning — he checked the porch column markers on his last pass
There is a National Guard logistics convoy staged at the north end of the St. Claude approach; he saw it when he came in from the canal side
voice: Direct, logistical, slightly impatient — he speaks in the shorthand of someone who has too many stops and not enough daylight
trustLogic: Opens to anyone who makes a decision quickly; shuts down when people want to discuss options he does not have time for
secrets: He has been skimming one water pouch per run from the relief supplies — not for himself, for a family he found on a second-floor balcony on Tupelo Street who are not on any triage sheet and whom he has not reported to the operations post

aggressionProfile.mildPressure: Checks his watch and tells you how many minutes he has
aggressionProfile.breakingPoint: Will not disclose the Tupelo Street family
aggressionProfile.fleeCondition: If asked directly about the missing water pouches
aggressionProfile.fleeStyle: Pulls the motor cord and moves the skiff away from the piling without looking back
aggressionProfile.chaseStyle: Navigates into the flooded side streets where larger vessels cannot follow
aggressionProfile.capturedBehavior: Gives up the Tupelo Street location immediately — he was going to report it anyway
